query:
SELECT channel_id, channel_name FROM youtube_channels WHERE channel_name LIKE '%conor%' OR channel_name LIKE '%kenny%' LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, talent_name, channel_id, short_code FROM affiliate_links LIMIT 10;
